title: Twelve new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta April 12
summary: On April 12, YKHC reports twelve new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. New COVID-19 Cases The 12 are residents in: Akiachak (1) Alakanuk (3) Bethel (2) Emmonak (1) Mountain Village (2) Toksook Bay (2) Tuntutuliak (1) — COVID-19 Updates and Community Information Updated COVID-19 testing hours: In Be...

title: New Energy Calculator Tool
summary: HEA’s new Energy Calculator is a great new tool created for our members. It is simple to use and gives you an estimated monthly kWh usage and bill for your home. ENERGY CALCULATOR TOOL

title: Chugachmiut Behavioral Health 5K Run/Walk to support MMIW
summary: Join us on May 5th and show your support! The post Chugachmiut Behavioral Health 5K Run/Walk to support MMIW first appeared on Chugachmiut .

title: Skipper Science App Helps Track a Changing Ocean
summary: The Skipper Science app enables Alaskan commercial fishermen to document abnormalities they notice while working on the water. The post Skipper Science App Helps Track a Changing Ocean appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
